creator: loise@kde.org
text:
Created attachment 171292
clucene-qt5 svn diff against HEAD marking as deprecated

We will merge the clucene-qt5 (package: qt5-clucene) with the qt5-help port in order to simplify building Qt 5 and its dependencies. clucene-qt5 is only required by qt5-help anyway, so there is no real need to keep it split off.

Qt 5.7 ports will have those two ports merged and the clucene-qt5 port will expire with Qt 5.7 ports.
